item.title: Couldn't imagine having a deaf or blind child.
item.description: The heartache of knowing your child would be at a disadvantage in life would be too much for me. So glad we now live in a world where a ton of technological options exist to help people like this.

COMMISSION IT!
y e s

item.title: I know I'm on duty, but cuddles pkease
item.dc:creator: Agarast

item.title: Painted myself as Elita-1 - MCroft07
item.description: I’m super proud of this one, full disclosure though, I actually did this as a commission for Paramount for the new film last year. I was so nervous about the paint because I had no idea how to even do it but thought it was a good challenge. I’d like to do more transformers in the future, I just need to bring myself to build another helmet out of paper again! I wanted to wait long enough so it didn’t seem like I was secretly trying to advertise it, just wanted to share because I’m really proud of how it turned out. When companies commission these from me, they basically ask me to make a video of this and then it gets shown across TikTok/Reels etc, it’s really fun to do and I’m grateful I get to do that as part of my job :) Thanks for all the nice comments, it's appreciated. Now for the big whammy faq Faq: I use body paint and do these in a mirror No, it is not AI Yes, I have read comic books in my life. No, I will not list every comic book ever existed to prove it to you (are you ok?) I use professional body paint covers this means I am not wearing a top but I am also not naked. I paint myself, I make the props myself, I film myself, and I also edit. This is my full time thing now (yayy) I paint these by looking in a mirror, with brushes, and paint It takes between 6-12 hours each Body painting myself is my hobby/passion I do own clothes It doesn’t tickle “Why don’t you just wear clothes” once again, body painting myself is my hobby/passion. I am painting my skin, I am not wearing a suit - but that does not mean I am naked. I know, even I think this is a ridiculous set of questions I have to constantly answer I did not go to art school, I am self taught. Talent gets you so far, but this is a learned skill. I've been painting myself for 16 years. The 07 does not mean I was born in 2007, UK 7 is my shoe size No, I don't need help painting my back, I don't want to paint my back, I don't need to paint my back. (also gross) No, I don't need help washing it off. (also you are gross) If you want to see more I am MCroft07 on IG, twitter, Tiktok, YouTube I paint them live on twitch I like doing the lip syncs, they're fun for me while I paint them. I couldn’t care less if you think they’re cringe. I am cringe but I am free My tattoos on my ribs are from Tomb Raider - I am a big TR fan I do not have an OF but if you want to send me money THAT badly you can just tip my twitch account. Haha. The shower afterwards takes about 15 minutes, I use a regular sponge and shower gel. It does "stain" but it's so slight it's barely noticeable. I think when people assume staining I look pink for 3-5 business days. Usually it just looks like there is a smudge on my armpit or something, the stain comes off the next day easily. It doesn't give my skin a reaction, if it did, I wouldn't do it. I don't miss the back off because otherwise my skin can't breathe. I know a lot of people took James Bond as fact there, but they also used a dangerous type of paint in the fictional film, I'm using body paint here, it's designed to go on the skin. The reason why it can look different at the end is because I am wearing a wig, I promise you it is not a different person because the hair changed. While on this topic, if my eyes change colour it’s because I am wearing contact lenses. (Those with an IQ above 10… I know. Even I’m shocked the wig thing is a frequent comment). I use body paint. It doesn’t tickle, I am very ticklish and this is fine. I don't sketch it out on paper before each one, I just roughly map it out on myself with an eyeliner and then start painting, I work better on improv. I don’t have an allergic reaction to the paint, but if you do it, you should always do a patch test first I do not know where you can buy body paint in every country. I know in the UK it is available at FacePaintingshop.com. I use a plethora of different brands, it’s best to search for them yourself online. I don’t work in Hollywood, I don’t want to. I just want to improve my body painting for myself. I am English, not American. (not sure why this upset some people though??) I do not go outside like this to scare people. 1, that would be very cold. 2, in this current age, everyone would take photos without me knowing and it would likely dox me :)))))) I don't paint my legs, I like just leaving the paint at the torso, I find painting the legs a bit boring tbh. I’m not a sweaty person, but if I was this would be a lot more difficult. Thank you to those of you who came from Imgur to my Twitch channel! “What’s the point in painting yourself when you can wear clothes?” all my clothes are in the laundry, had to resort to this, tough life It would not be quicker to jump into a pool of paint - think of the drying time?! If you're still here I’m currently eating a Strepsil because I caught a cold I don’t care that I wash it off at the end, I get to reuse this canvas, we love a reduce, reuse, recycle queen. I copy and paste the faq from a document each time and add new bits in, don't worry I'm not typing this all out each time like a maniac. I am not the lady who did the Maneskin video, it’s a cool video and she slayed, but it isn’t me. I can promise you there is not *a man* painting these and I am pretending to paint myself. I am genuinely painting myself. If you refuse to believe me, please seek help.
item.dc:creator: MCroft07

item.title: Take a moment to remember these young people
item.description:
So many smiles. So much talent. So many dreams.
All the young people here were living the dream. I hope their families eventually find some peace.

item.title: Friday PHONE CLEARING Meme Dump (Mostly Gaming Memes #291)
item.description:
1. He buddy, thank you for taking out the TV
2. You're a beta male, Sonic!
3
4. This guy might have a case against Pixar
5. POV: You're a employee of the Continental
6. These guys are amazing haha
7. Wizard has escaped the wizarding world and decided to try a muggle coffee shop
8. When you are rich, but also in Texas
9
10. Def starting a side quest
11. Australia at it again
12. Some stunning cosplay by seeuxiaorou
13. Police in NFS games be like:
14. Excuse me, would you like to danc...
15. I like narrative games where you can mess around with The Narrator! I think there should be more games like The Stanley Parable, so I'm making one : ) If you like this style of games and my humor, please consider wishlisting my wacky comedic narrative game here: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_Or_Youll_Delete_The_Multiverse/

ICM SUGGESTED TRACK: [ ▶ & SCROLL] Backpocket Breakdown - Burrito Eats, DAO YouTube: https://youtu.be/UbJO2eEyPJc?si=5KH18BhQfeXIS4kl Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/10kWuTOwDiybZtWG8Avxew?si=2de3c660a02642a8
Mist XG
María Jesús Contreras
Anna Mond
Anna Mond
NOOBOVICH
Sherif Dawoud
Sherif Dawoud
Eddy Gonzalez
Ramiz Asadullaev
Bo Chen Mel
Gleb Grusovsky
Ilker Sedar
Alejandro Burdisio
Matt Rhodes
Kyoung Hwan Kim
Suggested Track Playlists: (HIT SHUFFLE) YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLoIzKPbKfwniKOaadw-tB8kaEQiUQ1Yp4 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6cqV52puia81vNnPHxcz1W?si=yoUknxpQQVql9E-NZRQ4 *TOGGLE MATURE CONTENT IN SETTINGS TO VIEW OUR POSTS* ICM SQUAD: @vazquezdaniel, @ohvalleyofplenty, @nichoDriver, @Dirgekins, @onewallpaperaweek, @thedownlowe, @TheForbiddenSemicolon, @bagoffishstix, @JayKillBam, @majkongskull, @DingoJ0nes, @HandsomePenguin, @MrJwinkyface, @Gorgoror, @ciadmillefailte, @kaeldra ICM TIP JAR: https://www.patreon.com/InterwebChexMix Just to let you know, we do not take credit for any random art, comics, or photos featured in this collection; we only take credit for the daily effort of compiling the collections themselves. Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
item.dc:creator: MetaPathos

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1259 (All Conures are Anarchists)
item.description:
Let's get this bread, and let us be righteous sand in the gears of wrong. The days in the north are lengthening. Sorry, Australia and New Zealand, and, uh *checks map* South Africa and Argentina. (Are there any Argentinian Imgurians? If so, hello! Your dinosaurs are cool, even if your malbec is mostly a little overrated.)
This is kinda how 2025 has felt like so far: BRRRRRRRRRRRRT
Yeah, that tracks.
And then there's me, over here, curating both kinds of posts and sharing them to hopefully make this dark world we're all in a little brighter.
Take your meds with a full glass of water. If you can, take a shower.
Last year and already most of this year.
Hey, you. Yeah, you. If you are trying to escape somewhere and need to pass through Arizona, my apartment will have a futon for you to crash on, a shower, a Pippin (who will probably bite you) and I will not tell anyone you were here. I will give you something to eat and something to drink. Pippin won't snitch either, he's an anarchist, too. (But to be fair, All Conures are Anarchists, in the same way ACAB.)
Coconut water here I guess. I'm sorry.
I believe this is by Natalia Jagielska. I share her art a lot, but that's because I really like it.
Oof.
Be alive. Even if it's through spite. I know, it sucks. But the only way we can piss on their graves is if we survive this bullshit.
@VaultGirl69 is playing a cartoonishly innocent bard in my campaign right now, and it's awesome.
I also recommend adding cardamom to your coffee.
4 here today.
Mood.
Been listening to LOTR audio books to help me sleep. It's comforting.
I think they mean bad wierd but I haven't seen any boobs in the real world in months, either, so maybe I should aim to be as normal and mundane as possible to ever have the chance again. Hahah. I kid. I am WAY too far gone to be close to normal.
All Conures are Anarchists. All Cops are bastards.
New possible crush, we got a new receptionist who seems fun. Ugh.
Accurate.
Speaking from a month in.... yeah, Ew Year is accurate.
Hopefully, someone will say that in that voice to me one day. Or about me.
Calvin has clearly joined the SCA.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "I love you. I love you. Peek-a-boo!"
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Say it again but slower this time
item.dc:creator: nthensome

item.title: Goodbye to The King of the Jungle
item.description:
Pickles, you were a malevolent little shit who bit my toes and made them bleed but I’ll miss you.
To preface this- Pickles wasn’t my cat. He belonged to my boyfriend but I’ve been there every step of the way including when we got him.
The only picture I have with him and I’m not even in it
So two weeks ago my boyfriend, Chris called me at 3am from the vet clinic that’s over an hour away because pickles was diagnosed with a blockage in his urethra. $4,100 and 48 hours later we took him home without a checkup appointment because we were told he should be fine- just keep an eye on him and call if there’s a problem. We only had to call once for blood in his urine but they said as long as he was eating and drinking he’d be fine. I talked to the vet at my work and he said the same thing. The paperwork they gave us said that the following 2 weeks was the most likely for a blockage to happen again so the day he came home we got him medicated food.
He was doing good in these 2 weeks, the only hiccups we had was when he peed on the bed right after I gave him his gabapentin and another day right before I gave it to him. He also peed on the bed yesterday which we made note of. Then this morning he made a really weird screaming sound and started choking up a hairball which never came up. I discouraged Chris from taking him to the vet because all they would have done was monitor him and charge an obscene amount of money and I think it would have happened to him either way but now I’m kicking myself for that decision.
At 6:30 earlier tonight I was on the phone with my dad at Chris’s house babysitting his little sister, Destiny. She had come downstairs and was talking to me and my dad was still on the phone when we heard pickles SCREAM- I yelled for destiny to go upstairs and I called my boyfriend to tell him he needed to come home from work because something was wrong. I told him I was calling doc and I called my boss. I explained what had happened and how he was acting- completely unmoving except for a twitch of his tail and he wasn’t blinking even after I had tried shaking him and screamed his name. Doc had to really calm me down because I was unintelligible and screaming because I didn’t know what to do. He told me that he was dead and to put him in a plastic bag outside which I was not in a state to do. Chris called me back and said that we needed to take him back to the emergency clinic and I had to tell him we couldn’t do that. I then called my coworker and asked if we could take him to my workplace for the night and she came to meet us there. But god the worst thing I’ve ever experienced was Chris coming home to that. I was on the phone with my mom because I was having a panic attack and he came in and just broke down- this night was awful.
What sucks is that he still owes $4,100 which he paid to save his life, only for it to have not worked. He wasn’t even 2 years old.
Here he is about a week ago. No Nessie tax- it’s just Pickles tonight- please roll one for the goat tonight
item.dc:creator: danat101
